mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_report (user_id, books_read, pages_read, avg_session_minutes, period_start, period_end, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{booksRead}, #{pagesRead}, #{avgSessionMinutes}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, NOW(6))
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_report SET books_read = #{booksRead}, pages_read = #{pagesRead}, avg_session_minutes = #{avgSessionMinutes}, created_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
